emails.subject: GIR PD
emails.body: We should plan on being on the call. Since Mark is not on distribution, we should also see if he's available to be on as well. I'm assuming Jeff Dasovich will participate. Should we let Zenee know that we'll be on the call and not there in person? Susan Scott 11/30/2000 09:44 AM
